roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL: SHERIFF AFFIDAVIT WARRANT RETURN/X: SHERIFF AFFIDAVIT WARRANT IS DISCHARGED/VD: 04-07-21/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALLBE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALLBE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICEAND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/TE: 45 MINUTES/DOP/

/CAL: BENCH WARRANT RETURN/BWDNC/CTORD: MATTER IS IN LOVE WAIVER/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORDAND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PMON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD: PRE-HEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
/CAL:BENCH WARRANT STAY STATUS/NEGRPT/BWLIFT:12-21-21/FTA/OREVKD/BWI/BAIL:25,000/BWNUM:1ST/CTORD:THIS CASE IS NOW IN LOVE WAIVER STATUS/X: 2 OF2 BENCH WARRANTS ISSUED THIS DATE/NIGHTSERV/
